mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, content, msg_type, is_read, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} OR user_id = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message (user_id, title, content, msg_type, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{isRead}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_message SET user_id = #{userId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, msg_type = #{msgType}, is_read = #{isRead}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
